chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl. Jail Appeal No. D-40 and 41 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Hearing of Case 31.01.2018 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, Advocate for appellants. Mr. Khadim Hussain Khooharo, Addl. PG for the State. ---------- For reasons to be recorded later on, these appeals are allowed. The appellants are acquitted, they shall be released forthwith if not required in any other custody case. Judge Judge Abid H. Qazi/**
